rulings.Case Title: ZFC CONCEPTS, LLC DBA SLOANE, A CALIFORNIA VS. 1042 MINNA HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 28, 2018, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT MATT SMALL, PETER CONLEY, LISA PERKIN, CATHERINE NORRIS, 1042 MINNA HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Allegations in the Fourth Amended Cross-Complaint are sufficient to maintain all asserted causes of action against individual owners. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Nonstatutory Motion To Dismiss (Re Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 28, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT BALWANTSINH THAKOR, SHREE JALARAM HOTEL LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Nonstatutory Motion To Dismiss (Re Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint) DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare an order in accordance with CCP 437c(g) addressing all grounds for motion for summary judgment raised by the moving party. Based on the arguments and authorities cited by both parties the Court finds that as to the fraud (fraud in the inducement) claim there is no impermissible split and that harm caused by asserted fraud is not the same harm that was caused by previously settled/released claims. Sawyer v. First City Financial Corp. (1981) 124 Cal.App.3d 390. The Court notes that Defendants did not move for summary adjudication on each cause of action, e.g. breach of contract, negligence, violation of SFRO. There is also a triable issue of fact as to the accrual date of fraud. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEFAN ERIC ADLER ET AL VS. ERNA SUE GROSSOM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Or In The Alternative, To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 28, 2018, line 3. PLAINTIFF STEFAN ADLER, JENNIFER ROSDAIL Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Or In The Alternative, To Compel Arbitration DENIED. Court lacks jurisdiction. Sayta v. Chu (2017) 17 Cal.App.5th 960. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points & Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Response; Proposed Order

rulings.Case Title: DINO FARMAS VS. CHIRAG DOE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 28, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANT CHIRAG SHAH'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. Triable issue of fact whether Defendant's sub-tenancy was approved by the landlord. =(501/REQ)
